---
title: "Project Overview"
---

This project, part of the VAST Challenge 2025, Mini Challenge 1, aims to analyze the career of musician Sailor Shift and the rise of the Oceanus Folk genre. 

Our primary objective is to develop a visual analytics website to explore:
- Sailor Shift's career development and collaborations.
- The influence network of Sailor Shift and Oceanus Folk.
- The evolution and spread of the Oceanus Folk genre.
- Identification of potential future stars in the Oceanus Folk scene.

This website will present our analysis, visualizations, and findings.
